2160710.name: Lost Memories
2160710.description:
Overview of the game:
Getting lost and completing puzzles to continue on the path. With roguelike elements mixed in with horror and storytelling. If you are into speed running through games there is a mode for you! Lost Memories has a lot to offer for all players to enjoy.

Gameplay features:
An action horror game where are you running hide and solve puzzles.
Fear system: if you aren’t in a building or around a campfire, you will start the game fear which will make your vision, cloudy, and your movement slower.
Weapons: there is one single weapon that can disable the enemies movement if you can find it.
Flashlight: the flashlight is used for finding your way through Lost memories.


Why I made this game:
I made this game for the players to experience a simple roguelike horror game with passionate storytelling.

What this game expresses:
I want Lost Memories to have the players feel like no matter the memory no matter how long it has been since the memory. It will never be lost. I hope everyone enjoys my game and can find peace when they play and challenge themselves.

Content:
Being early but ready for the public. I wanted the game to be released so they can experience the single-player mode. I have a multiplayer mode in mind that will be released at a later time.
2160710.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语*, 意大利语*, 德语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯语*, 保加利亚语*, 捷克语*, 丹麦语*, 荷兰语*, 芬兰语*, 希腊语*, 匈牙利语*, 日语*, 韩语*, 挪威语*, 波兰语*, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙*, 罗马尼亚语*, 俄语*, 简体中文*, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲*, 瑞典语*, 泰语*, 繁体中文*, 土耳其语*, 乌克兰语*, 越南语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
